name: PersonalizationBroadcast

neutralConcepts: MACHINE event literal: 'PersonalizationCompleted' — never computed or concatenated
NODE C: 4 inputs optional — each absent input has named fallback, never DataProcessResult.failure
Consent gate: private-mode users get completion record stored but no downstream enqueue
DNA-8: store feed config BEFORE UserFeedPersonalized emit
Degradable analytics: B1 timeout produces partialResults — C node must handle this gracefully

ironRules.rule: PersonalizationCompleted event type MUST be the string literal 'PersonalizationCompleted' — stored as 'as const'. Any dynamic computation, interpolation, or variable assignment from a config value = BUILD_FAILURE. FLOW-01 owns 'OnboardingCompleted'; two flows emitting same literal = silent duplicate feeds.

NODE C: each of A1/A2/A3/B1 inputs is optional with named fallback. No required() validation on optional signals. Missing signal → degraded but valid output. Never DataProcessResult.failure for absent optional input.

Broadcast consent gate: check user privacy setting before each enqueue call. private_mode=true → store PersonalizationCompleted record (DNA-8 satisfied) but skip queue.enqueue. The record proves completion; the broadcast is consent-gated.
DNA-8: storeDocument(personalization-completions, ...) BEFORE queue.enqueue('PersonalizationCompleted', ...). Record must exist before any downstream consumer can react.
PersonalizationCompleted payload contains NO PII — tenantId, userId, feedId, profileId, personalizationCompletedAt only. No questionnaire data, no goals, no challenges.
FLOW-02 completion event is 'PersonalizationCompleted' — NEVER 'OnboardingCompleted'. Collision with FLOW-01 causes FLOW-08 (ListingDiscoveryEngine) to create duplicate feeds with no local error.

keywords: personalization broadcast consent gate machine literal PersonalizationCompleted independent fallbacks degradable analytics optional signals
